info.title: GOG API
info.description: REST API specification for GOG (Good Old Games) platform integration including authentication, library management, game information, downloads, and cloud saves. Based on GameNative implementation.

servers.description: GOG Content System — build metadata, secure links, dependency open links
GOG CDN (Fastly) — depot manifests and game chunk downloads. Time-limited tokens embedded in URLs.
GOG Remote Config — cloud save location configuration (unauthenticated)

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: OAuth2 authentication endpoints. Token exchange uses GET with credentials in query params (GOG-specific pattern).

tags.name: Content System
tags.description: Build metadata, secure CDN links, and dependency management via content-system.gog.com

tags.name: CDN
tags.description: GOG CDN (gog-cdn-fastly.gog.com) for depot manifests and game chunk downloads. URLs include embedded time-limited auth tokens obtained from the secure_link API.

tags.name: Cloud Saves
tags.description: Cloud save synchronization via cloudstorage.gog.com. NOTE: URL path order is /v1/{userId}/{clientId} — userId comes first.

tags.name: Remote Config
tags.description: Unauthenticated remote configuration for cloud save locations

get.description: Initiates the OAuth2 authorization flow. Returns HTML login page that redirects to redirect_uri with authorization code upon success. The client generates a random 64-char hex state token for CSRF protection.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: OAuth2 client ID (Galaxy app client ID)

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: CSRF protection token — 64-char random hex string generated by client

get.summary: Exchange authorization code or refresh token
get.description: Exchanges authorization code for access/refresh tokens, or uses a refresh token to get new tokens. NOTE: This is a GET request with credentials in query parameters — not a POST with an Authorization header. Used for both Galaxy app tokens (client_id=46899977096215655) and game-specific tokens (game's own client_id/client_secret from the build manifest).

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Galaxy app client ID, or game-specific client ID for game token refresh

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Required when grant_type=authorization_code

parameters.name: refresh_token
parameters.description: Required when grant_type=refresh_token

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Required when grant_type=authorization_code. Must match the URI used in /auth.

get.description: Returns list of game IDs (integers) owned by the authenticated user.
Returns detailed metadata about a specific game.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansion fields. Known values: downloads, description, screenshots, videos, related_products, changelog

get.summary: Get available builds for a game
get.description: Returns build metadata. The most recent build's `link` is a time-limited URL for downloading the compressed build manifest. Request generation=2 first; fall back to generation=1 if no Gen 2 builds exist.

parameters.name: generation
parameters.description: Manifest generation. Use 2 (default), fall back to 1 if no Gen 2 builds.

get.description: Returns time-limited CDN base URL templates (url_format + parameters). Client substitutes {key} -> value and un-escapes \/ -> / to build the final CDN base URL for downloading chunks or Gen 1 slices.

parameters.name: generation
parameters.description: 2 for Gen 2 game files. Omit for Gen 1 type=depot requests.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: / for Gen 2 game files; /{platform}/{timestamp}/ for Gen 1; /patches/store for patches

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Required for Gen 1 requests

parameters.name: root
parameters.description: Required for patch secure links

get.description: Returns CDN URL templates for accessing the dependency store (same format as secure_link). Used to build the base URL for the dependency repository index.

200.description: CDN URL templates for dependency store

get.description: Downloads a compressed (zlib/gzip) Gen 2 depot manifest. Path segments: hash01=hash[0:2], hash23=hash[2:4], fullHash=full hash. Requires Bearer auth.

parameters.name: hash01
parameters.description: First 2 hex chars of the manifest hash

parameters.name: hash23
parameters.description: Characters 2-4 of the manifest hash

200.description: Compressed depot manifest JSON. Structure: depot.items[] containing DepotFile (path, md5, sha256, flags[], productId, chunks[{compressedMd5, md5, size, compressedSize}]), DepotDirectory (path), or DepotLink (path, target) entries.

get.description: Downloads a Gen 1 depot manifest as plain (uncompressed) JSON. URL parameters are derived from the Gen 1 build manifest's productTimestamp field and depot manifest references. Requires Bearer auth.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: productTimestamp from the Gen 1 build manifest

200.description: Gen 1 depot file list JSON (uncompressed). depot.files[] structure.

get.description: Downloads a compressed dependency depot manifest. No authentication required — this is an open CDN endpoint. Same compressed JSON format as the game depot manifest.

parameters.name: hash01
parameters.description: First 2 hex chars of the hash

parameters.name: hash23
parameters.description: Characters 2-4 of the hash

200.description: Compressed dependency depot manifest (same structure as Gen 2 depot manifest)

get.description: Downloads a compressed game data chunk. URL is built from the secure_link base URL + this path + time-limited auth query params. MD5-verified after decompression.

parameters.name: hash01
parameters.description: First 2 hex chars of compressedMd5

parameters.name: hash23
parameters.description: Characters 2-4 of compressedMd5

parameters.name: compressedMd5
parameters.description: MD5 of compressed chunk (from DepotFile.chunks[].compressedMd5)

parameters.name: CDN auth params
parameters.description: Time-limited auth tokens from secure_link response embedded in the CDN URL

200.description: zlib-compressed chunk bytes. MD5-verified post-decompression against chunks[].md5.

get.description: Downloads a specific byte range of a Gen 1 game installer using HTTP Range. URL is secure_link base URL with /main.bin appended plus auth query params. User-Agent must be 'GOG Galaxy'. MD5-verified against depot manifest hash.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: Byte range: bytes={offset}-{offset+size-1}

parameters.name: CDN auth params
parameters.description: Time-limited auth tokens from secure_link response

206.description: Partial content — raw bytes for the requested range

get.description: Returns remote configuration for a game client including cloud save location paths. Unauthenticated endpoint. Client hardcodes platform to 'Windows' since games run via Wine.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Game-specific client ID (from build manifest)

200.description: Remote configuration including cloud save locations

get.description: Returns a JSON array of all cloud save files for a game and user. NOTE: path order is /v1/{userId}/{clientId} — userId comes before clientId. The hash 'aadd86936a80ee8a369579c3926f1b3c' is a deletion marker. Client filters by dirname prefix.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Game-specific client ID

200.description: JSON array of cloud save file entries

get.description: Downloads a specific cloud save file. NOTE: path order is userId then clientId.

parameters.name: dirname
parameters.description: Save location name from remote config (e.g. 'Documents/My Games/GameName')

parameters.name: relativePath
parameters.description: Relative file path within the save location

put.description: Uploads a raw cloud save file. X-Object-Meta-LocalLastModified should be the file's last modified time in Unix seconds. NOTE: Files are not gzip-compressed before upload (raw bytes).

parameters.name: X-Object-Meta-LocalLastModified
parameters.description: File last-modified time in Unix seconds (file.lastModified() / 1000 as string)

GameBearerAuth.description: Game-specific OAuth2 access token obtained by refreshing with the game's own client_id/client_secret from the build manifest

publisher.description: May be a string or an object with a name field

genres.description: Array of genre objects or plain strings

languages.description: Map of language code to language name

description.description: May be a string or an object with a lead field

installers.description: Client uses installers[0].total_size for disk size estimate

items.description: Builds ordered newest-first. Use items[0].link to download the build manifest.

link.description: Time-limited URL to download the compressed build manifest JSON

legacy_build_id.description: Gen 1 only. Used to construct productTimestamp for Gen 1 CDN manifest URLs.

BuildManifest.description: Parsed from zlib/gzip-compressed JSON at items[0].link. Shared between Gen 1 and Gen 2 with some Gen 1-only fields.

clientSecret.description: Game-specific OAuth2 client secret. Used with the game's client_id for cloud save token refresh.

dependencies.description: Dependency IDs required by this game

productTimestamp.description: Gen 1 only. Used to build Gen 1 depot manifest CDN URLs.

DepotRef.description: Reference to a depot within a build manifest

manifest.description: Manifest hash used to fetch the depot manifest from CDN

DependencyDepot.description: Entry in the dependency manifest's depots array

manifest.description: Hash for fetching the dependency depot manifest from CDN

SecureLinkResponse.description: CDN URL templates with time-limited auth tokens. Client interpolates {key} -> value in url_format and un-escapes backslash-slash to produce the final CDN base URL.

parameters.description: Key-value pairs substituted into url_format

RemoteConfigResponse.description: Remote configuration for a game client. Client always reads content.Windows since games run via Wine.

name.description: Save location identifier used as dirname in cloud storage paths

location.description: Windows-style save path (may contain environment variable placeholders)

CloudSaveFileEntry.description: Single file entry in the cloud save listing array. The deletion marker hash 'aadd86936a80ee8a369579c3926f1b3c' means the file was deleted.

name.description: Full path: dirname/relativePath. Client filters by dirname prefix.

hash.description: MD5 of file content. aadd86936a80ee8a369579c3926f1b3c = deletion marker.
